subtitle: Boost your financial health through
subtitle_end: Understand why you spend, not just where.
trust: No credit card required · Free to start · Bank-level security
card1_desc: Securely import your PDF statements. Our AI extracts every transaction instantly.
card2_desc: Discover the emotions behind your transactions. Break impulse cycles with data.
card3_desc: AI-generated nudges tailored to your habits, goals, and behavioral patterns.
tagline: Trusted by early users across Europe
gs_subtitle: Complete these steps to unlock your personalized financial intelligence dashboard.
gs_step1_desc: Securely import your last 3 months of PDF statements. Encrypted in transit.
gs_step2_desc: 7 quick questions to model your emotional spending patterns.
gs_step3_desc: Define your financial targets and let AI calculate your monthly path.
gs_upload_subtitle: Last 3 months · PDF or CSV · Max 10 MB each
gs_survey_subtitle: Helps us detect your emotional spending triggers
gs_q1: When I'm stressed, I tend to buy things I don't need.
gs_q2: I usually spend more when I feel emotionally drained.
gs_q3: I check my balance before making major purchases.
gs_q4: Seeing my accumulated expenses makes me anxious.
gs_q5: I prefer paying by card even when I have cash available.
gs_q6: What emotions usually accompany your impulse purchases?
gs_q7: At what point in the month do you feel the most financial pressure?
gs_goals_subtitle: AI will calculate your optimal monthly savings target
gs_goal_desc_label: What do you want to achieve?
gs_goal_placeholder: e.g. Emergency fund, Vacation, New laptop…
ins_subtitle: AI analysis of your spending patterns and financial behaviors
ins_loading_hint: This may take up to 30 seconds
ins_persona_desc: Based on spending patterns and behavioral AI analysis
ins_recs_empty: Upload more statements to get personalized recommendations.
an_subtitle: This takes about 45 seconds. We're reading your statement, extracting every transaction, and building your personalized financial profile.
an_hint: Please keep this tab open while we work
ins_nudge_impulse_1: Before your next online purchase, wait 48 hours. Is it still necessary?
ins_nudge_impulse_2: Try the 10-10-10 rule: How will you feel about this purchase in 10 minutes, 10 hours, 10 days?
ins_nudge_impulse_3: Unsubscribe from promotional emails — they're designed to trigger you.
ins_nudge_comfort_1: Notice when you eat out for emotional reasons vs. hunger. Log the emotion instead.
ins_nudge_comfort_2: Replace one delivery order per week with cooking. Save €20+ and gain satisfaction.
ins_nudge_stress_1: When stress urges spending, try a 5-minute breathing exercise first.
ins_nudge_stress_2: Track the emotion before swiping your card. Awareness is the first CBT step.
ins_nudge_social_1: Suggest free social activities: parks, potlucks, hikes.
ins_nudge_social_2: Set a weekend social budget in advance and commit to it publicly.
ins_nudge_none_1: Great spending patterns! Keep building your emergency fund.
ins_weekend_alert_desc: Higher spending detected on weekends. Setting a weekend budget can help.
